description: Simple task management app with CRUD operations
prompt: Build a task management app where users can create, read, update, and delete tasks. Each task has a title, description, due date, and completion status.

responseJson.architecture: Full-stack Next.js application with App Router, Prisma ORM for PostgreSQL, and Ant Design UI components. Frontend pages consume API routes that handle CRUD operations on the Task entity.

files.content:
# PostgreSQL connection string
DATABASE_URL="postgresql://user:password@localhost:5432/taskdb"

# Next.js
NEXTAUTH_SECRET="your-secret-key-here"
NEXTAUTH_URL="http://localhost:3000"

{
  "name": "task-manager",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "private": true,
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "next dev",
    "build": "if [ -f prisma/schema.prisma ]; then prisma generate --schema=./prisma/schema.prisma; fi && NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=512' next build",
    "start": "next start",
    "lint": "eslint",
    "db:push": "prisma db push",
    "db:generate": "prisma generate"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@ant-design/icons": "^5.3.0",
    "@ant-design/nextjs-registry": "^1.0.0",
    "@prisma/client": "^6.9.0",
    "antd": "^5.15.0",
    "dayjs": "^1.11.10",
    "next": "16.2.1",
    "react": "19.2.4",
    "react-dom": "19.2.4"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@tailwindcss/postcss": "^4",
    "@types/node": "^20",
    "@types/react": "^19",
    "@types/react-dom": "^19",
    "eslint": "^9",
    "eslint-config-next": "16.2.1",
    "prisma": "^6.9.0",
    "tailwindcss": "^4",
    "typescript": "^5"
  }
}

{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "lib": ["dom", "dom.iterable", "esnext"],
    "allowJs": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "strict": true,
    "noEmit": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "module": "esnext",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "isolatedModules": true,
    "jsx": "preserve",
    "incremental": true,
    "plugins": [{ "name": "next" }],
    "paths": { "@/*": ["./src/*"] }
  },
  "include": ["next-env.d.ts", "**/*.ts", "**/*.tsx", ".next/types/**/*.ts"],
  "exclude": ["node_modules"]
}

checks.notes: All imports point to files in the output (@/lib/prisma, @ant-design/*, @prisma/client) or scaffold.
No TODOs or placeholder code found.
Uses App Router (src/app), compatible with scaffold conventions.
Frontend fetches from /api/tasks and /api/tasks/[id] which are implemented.
All packages are stable versions compatible with Next.js 14.
Prisma schema defines Task model matching the spec. All fields are valid types.
Auth not required for this app. N/A.
DATABASE_URL and NEXTAUTH_SECRET listed in .env.example with descriptions.
